summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for L'atelier Secret - 12 soins migration. All 12 soin pages load correctly with images, content, and navigation working as expected.
passed_tests: Soins dropdown menu displays all 12 treatments
Homepage services section displays 6 popular soins with correct links
/facial-de-luxe page loads with correct title, images, and content
/soin-anti-age page loads with correct title, images, and content
/irregularites-pigmentaires page loads with correct title, images, and content
/facial-desincrustant page loads with correct title, images, and content
/peeling-charbon page loads with correct title, images, and content
/peeling-algues page loads with correct title, images, and content
/traitement-raffermissant page loads with correct title, images, and content
/microdermabrasion page loads with correct title, images, and content
/microneedling page loads with correct title, images, and content
/soin-silhouette page loads with correct title, images, and content
/soin-lumineux page loads with correct title, images, and content
Navigation between soin pages works correctly via dropdown menu
Consultation Gratuite button navigates to booking page
All images (5-6 per page) load successfully on each soin page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 soins implemented and working. SOINS_DATA in SoinPage.jsx contains all treatment data. NAV_ITEMS in Header.jsx contains all 12 dropdown links. App.js has routes for all 12 soin pages.
